554a769e3063642017006b1f_8: Hold your horses, Seattle. We still need to plant the visitor record data and find out which floor the lab is on. Looks like we can do that from down here, though.
554d1cae323431b417000fc2_2: Uhhh... Seattle... did we tell Cadmus and his people to mutiny?
555e6174323431b40a00673b_33: Um. Shouldn't you be lording it over the Repulse Bay? That was what Seattle helped you out for. I mean, I don't want to be rude, but why are you here...?
54d96b813030316814006f66_217: I'm sure that the briefing I sent you will satisfy your curiosity. Trust me - this is a good job with a solid plan behind it. You'll see as soon as you've read it... and speaking of which, you should go do that now.
54d96b813030316814006f66_329: Hey. I've come to a decision. I want these memories out of my head. They're an unpleasant distraction, and I was happier without them.
54d96b813030316814006f66_502: We're close - we're so close I can taste it. A few more hours - maybe a day or two - and you'll have your father back. Josephine Tsang is going to get what's coming to her. For you, me, and especially for Nightjar, Gutshot, and Carter. And we've got the Plastic-Faced Man to thank for it.
54e6531030636444140071ff_10: Really? That's what you care about? Come on - get your head in the game. He's a client, and that's all he is. If we don't look out for ourselves first and foremost, we're going to be pushing up daisies come morning.
54e6531030636444140071ff_79: Really? REALLY?! That's what you care about? Come on - get your head in the game! He's a client, and that's all he is. If we don't look out for ourselves first and foremost, we're going to be pushing up daisies come morning.
555ba1a5323431c01900164e_14: Before this goes any further, I'd like to say that I agree with Dimalanta. Think about it: he's after the corporations. We're constantly being hindered by them. Just look around us at what Tsang Corp's doing to the Walled City! I think it'd be worth our while to let him go.
556cf8753234312c01003971_19: Good. Oh, and hey? We aren't going loud yet, got it? Whatever you do, don't start shooting. We can't afford to send Rhombus running before we can get him cornered.
556cf8753234312c01003971_21: Don't say that. It's bad luck. Oh, and hey? We aren't going loud yet - you got that? Whatever you do, don't start shooting. We can't afford to send Rhombus running before we can get him cornered.
556d2c843234316c180010b2_15: I don't need cash. I need someone to help me out. You look like the kind of person who could do that, so just hear me out. This'll take you five minutes, tops, and then you'll have your uniform free of charge.
556fcecb3234319c1b003072_40: What happens to most plans. It gave way to improvisation. Now, do you think that I can maybe get a hand here? I give them about five seconds before--
556fcecb3234319c1b003072_42: Yeah. No way around it. Now, do you think that I can maybe get a hand here? I give them about five seconds before--
56002e56306364541f00015b_4: The germ warfare lab is what we need to find. Should be a pretty straight shot from here to there. Oh, and listen... places like this aren't known for the forgiving attitudes of their security staff. The guards are probably trained to shoot on sight, so we should plan on shooting them first.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_47: Calm down, Gun Show. There might be another way. Hell, maybe the boss can request that Qiu restore your SIN, but not their own. We don't know.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_193: It's funny how people remember things. Yeah, when we squatted together and later, when we were living with Ray, I was still a violent son of a bitch, but basically under control. But that was you. You were the voice of reason. The brains.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_239: Did I say that? No. There's a difference between "I don't feel like talking right now" and "never speak to me again." It's subtle, but I think that you can find it if you try.
54d96ae73030316814006f45_545: I sat that one out, remember?
54dbef30653937cc15006dd1_11: Hey, these guys are right on the edge. Both blasted, one pissed off, the other... well an asshole.
558898d6623666a012005538_18: It'll be safer if we split up. You lead some of us to clear the way to the machine. Auntie's men can follow with the rest of us, escorting Raymond, once the way is secure.
5589c2fc623666fc370055a8_6: I think we're all learning a lot here. For example, we learned that you're a genius who can create magical machines. We learned that you have a rich, powerful mother on the ruling council of Hong Kong who kidnapped you to reprogram your brain. And we learned that the two of you are responsible for the suffering of thousands.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_95: Might as well get to it, then, because we've got nothin'. Oh, and hey? Hurry. These choppy waters are doing a number on my stomach, and I'm fresh out of Dramamine.
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_25: Come on... think about what you're doing. I want my life back, damn it!
566f0c4f643661780f0042a2_36: Come on... think about what you're doing. I want my life back, damn it!
56787587626632bc06006fa0_29: I don't. You do whatever you need to do - I won't try to stop you. But for God's sake, fucking tell me before you go running off into the night this time, okay?
556740a732343744370063d1_16: Listen... We should let Tanjiro go. He has given us more than enough to accomplish the task at hand, and he is...a friend, of sorts. I would be sorry if any harm came to him.
566b46da643661f4110066d7_10: Fourteen years of unerring good fortune. For the term of the contract, my companion cannot fail. If you fight them, fate itself will conspire against you.
566b46da643661f4110066d7_19: Fourteen years of unerring good fortune. For the term of the contract, my companion cannot fail. If you fight them, fate itself will conspire against you.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_3: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Welcome to Heoi Little bird, On behalf of your friends at The Heoi Chamber of Commerce and the Swift Winds Mahjong Parlor, I welcome you to the community of Heoi and to our new business venture.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_5: From: Is0bel Subject: Your Mission Computer Hey. I've set up your mission computer to automatically collect and collate news reports, information and media that might be of interest to you. Some of the keywords I've got it trolling for are things like "Raymond," "Duncan," "Walled City," et cetera.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_7: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Resources I have been instructed to inform you of the various suppliers present in Heoi. Auntie Cheng has cultivated a commercial district of well-stocked and trustworthy vendors. Whoever you choose to do business with, you will be in good hands.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_11: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Resources I have been instructed to inform you of the various suppliers present in Heoi. Auntie Cheng has cultivated a commercial district of well-stocked and trustworthy vendors. Whoever you choose to do business with, you will be in good hands.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_15: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Serial Killer I've got a problem, little bird, and you're going to help me solve it. I do a lot of business with the Whampoans. If you're not familiar with the term, I'll forgive you... you are an outsider, after all.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_20: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Serial Killer Good. I'll tell the Elders you're coming. They don't like outsiders, and they might shoot at you if I don't warn them that you'll be arriving.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_22: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Fwd: Artifact Liberation Welcome to the shadows, little bird. I've received a request from an archaeologist named Mr. Drake. He's interested in liberating certain artifacts from beneath a manor house located in Tai Po. I've attached a copy of the video message that he sent me.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_33: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Fwd: Artifact Liberation Excellent. I've attached directions to Liu's estate to this message. Good luck. Don't fuck it up.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_35: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Geomantic Sabotage Geomancy is big business in the Free Enterprise Zone. Here in Hong Kong, feng shui isn't just the act of rearranging your kitchen to make things look pretty. The fortunes of empires rise and fall with the ebb and flow of qi. And sometimes, that flow needs a helping hand.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_42: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Geomantic Sabotage Good. Contact me when you've finished the job, and I'll send you your cut of the payment.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_52: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Attending a Party Little bird, I need you to come to the parlor. A friend and business partner of mine named Dr. Shenyang has need of your services - something about attending a fancy party in Repulse Bay. He was unwilling to give me the details. I think he wanted to size you up himself.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_53: From: Is0bel Subject: Raymond Black's History Duncan asked me to do some digging on my own into Raymond's history - I guess he doesn't trust Kindly Cheng to give him the full story. I can't say I blame him, since she'd hide things from us if it was in her best interest to do so. So I've been poking around various corners of the Matrix, trying to dig up what I can.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_57: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Urgent Task Little birds have been whispering in my ear about an urgent and high-paying run. Steel Arm Lu, a Red Pole, managed to get his hands on information concerning a prototype laser weapon in development by Ares Asia Holdings.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_67: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Urgent Task Very well. Steel Arm Lu sends his regards, and 'bids you good fortune and plentiful ammunition.' The dramatic git. Don't die, little bird. Our arrangement has been very profitable so far, and I would hate to lose that.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_71: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Restaurant Job One of the things I've learned over the years is that even the rich and powerful have annoyances - thorns in their side, if you will. No one is without troubles. The rich just have different ways of solving them.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_76: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Restaurant Job I've let the client know you've accepted the job. By the time you arrive at the Shangri-La, the boat to get you out will be waiting.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_78: From: Crafty Xu Subject: Mother's Notes Hey, here are those notes you asked for. But before you dive in, a heads up: they’re a complete transcription of that list from my mother's journal. As in, they’re the thoughts and ramblings of an insane woman. It’s not an easy read.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_88: From: Gobbet Subject: Auntie Cheng and Josephine Hey Seattle, I think I can add a little context to that thing between Auntie and Josephine Tsang - you know, the thing that makes Auntie hit the sauce and talk revenge. This a combo of stuff I heard and stuff I put together myself, so your mileage may vary.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_94: From: Crafty Xu Subject: More Notes Hey, While I was blazing through my mom’s journals, something struck me: we’ve spent so much time reading about the Walled City that we haven’t thought to look at it. To paint a picture with the information we’ve been gathering.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_100: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Urgent Problem We have a problem to solve. It is urgent. Meet me at the mahjong parlor. Kindly's orders. Strangler Bao
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_101: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Out of Town I'm not in Heoi right now, so don't bother coming to see me. We'll talk when I return. Please continue with our business ventures in the meantime. - Auntie C.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_102: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Data Retrieval I hope you're enjoying your newfound success in the shadows. I've got another job for you - one that should prove very lucrative indeed. I've been contacted by an employee of the Eastern Tiger Corporation, and he needs you to steal some research data and biological samples from his employer.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_107: From: Kindly Cheng Subject: Re: Data Retrieval I've let Captain Jomo know you're ready. You can find him down on the end of the pier my parlor is on. He'll handle everything from there on out.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_109: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Problem Solved I see that you have solved the problem. Kindly will be pleased. -Strangler Bao
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_110: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Problem Solved Since you could not handle this simple task, I have done so myself. Your performance is disappointing. -Strangler Bao
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_111: //-preface:null_field //-[sender]:server_id:null_field yo. i'm outta here. shoot straight carnivore. look for me on shadowland: tin helmet is my handle. my email spoofing's pretty wicked, huh? thanks. maximum law
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_126: From: Gaichu Subject: Red Samurai Ambush This email is to reiterate the information on my former team, which I shared with you earlier. In short, I need to kill the remaining members of my previous unit, so that I can be free of their perpetual hunt.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_129: From: Gaichu Subject: Red Samurai ambush Excellent. The sooner we can be done with this, the happier I will be. I will prepare my gear.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_131: //-preface:null_field //-[sender]:server_id:null_field yo, you wouldn't believe where i am and how much people are betting on this fight between an awakened giant lizard thing and a pit bull. i'm gonna hitch a freighter to seattle. catch you later carnivore. maximum law
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_132: From: Dreamland Subject: Great meeting you! Thanks for shaking me down to get that neural inhibitor program I wrote. It’s always refreshing to be physically intimidated in your own apartment. How could I ever forget it? The answer is, I won’t!
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_134: From: Dreamland Subject: Hope It Helps Good luck with your whole, “What happened to my father?” thing. Rough deal. If nothing else, I hope the people responsible get what’s coming to them and that my neural inhibitor program helps you get some payback. - D.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_135: From: Dreamland Subject: Thanks! Just wanted to say thanks for the hook up with Rhombus. Is0bel was right, he was able to make a few modifications for me that… well let’s just say I have some relief and leave it at that.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_137: From: Dreamland Subject: Damaged I think the wetware interface for my headware was damaged while I was trying to help you. Terrible migraine, eyes hard to focus, nausea… I don’t know what Is0bel did, but she messed me up. Serves me right for trying to help anyone other than myself. Do me a favor and stay away from me. Tell the dwarf, too. - D.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_138: From: Dreamland Subject: Out! Just wanted to let you know that thanks to the nuyen you hooked me up with, I made it out of HK in one piece. I’m somewhere on the mainland in a safehouse that’s a serious step up from that dump you found me in.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_140: From: Bao JianJun Subject: Not Today One day, the Yellow Lotus in Heoi will be run by another Straw Sandal. One day, my actions will no longer be restrained by a “superior” who cannot see what a vile piece of work you are.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_146: From Dr. Shenyang Good work out there, kid. Here's the money I promised ya. -Dr. Shenyang
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_148: From: Mr. Drake Well done. You went above and beyond what I asked, and liberated some truly precious artifacts. I've attached the payment you're owed, plus a little bonus. I trust that you'll keep quiet about what exactly was liberated from Liu's little 'museum'. I'll come collect the books from Kindly Cheng shortly. - Mr. Drake
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_149: From: Mr. Drake Well done. I've attached the payment you're owed. I trust that you'll keep quiet about what exactly was liberated from Liu's little 'museum'. I'll come collect the books from Kindly Cheng shortly. - Mr. Drake
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_150: From: Mr. Drake I'm rather disappointed you couldn't manage to liberate even a few of Liu's artifacts. Still, you got me the books, so that's worth something. I'll come collect them from Kindly Cheng shortly. - Mr. Drake
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_152: From: Kindly Cheng I asked you to solve a problem, and your method of solving it is to kill the people I was doing a favor for? I have half a mind to throw you into the goddamn bay.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_154: From: Kindly Cheng The Whampoan Elders are satisfied with how you handled their little ghoul problem. They've even expressed how impressed they were with your efficacy. I have no idea what you did out there, but you've done well.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_156: From: Kindly Cheng The Whampoans tell me that they've ousted all of their council of Elders - something to do with you exposing their efforts to cover up their own mess. It isn't the resolution I expected, but I think it's acceptable.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_159: From: Tigath Wright I appreciate your conviction in sticking with the job, despite the complications involved. You've definitely earned some money on this job. -Tigath
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_160: From: Hwang Jae-Min The money I promised you is attached to this mail. I'm glad we could work something out that benefited both of us. -Hwang
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_161: From: Kindly Cheng I don't know how to describe this job other than by calling it a complete clusterfuck. You did the right thing, killing both Wright and Hwang. I don't appreciate worms who try to stiff me, and I sure as shit don't like the Seoulpa Rings.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_164: From: Steel Arm Lu Your payment is attached. I confess that I am very pleased with your work - it's not every runner who could have pulled off a job of this magnitude. Well done. -Lu
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_166: From: Kindly Cheng The client is pleased with how you handled the situation. Rooster Lo has been very contrite and forthcoming - due in no small part to the violence with which you handled the opposition. Your payment is attached. -Kindly Cheng
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_167: From: Kindly Cheng The client is pleased with how you handled the situation. Rooster Lo has been very contrite and forthcoming - due in no small part to the violence with which you handled the opposition. You've even earned a little extra for taking out the Talon. Your payment is attached. -Kindly Cheng
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_168: From: Kindly Cheng The client is fairly pleased with how you handled the situation. Rooster Lo has been very contrite and forthcoming - due in no small part to the violence with which you handled the opposition. However, a fee has been deducted for the injuries Rooster sustained against the client's instructions. Your payment is attached. -Kindly Cheng
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_169: From: Kindly Cheng The client is fairly pleased with how you handled the situation. Rooster Lo has been very contrite and forthcoming - due in no small part to the violence with which you handled the opposition. The client was even willing to overlook the injuries Rooster sustained after hearing that you killed the Talon. Your payment is attached. -Kindly Cheng
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_171: From: Kindly Cheng A little bird whispered in my ear that Wuxing's fortunes are already falling - their stock value dropped by two percent already. The client finds this to be an acceptable indication of your success, and has forwarded payment. I've attached your cut to this email. -Kindly Cheng
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_173: From: Kindly Cheng Brave of you to do side work without telling me - or stupid. Take your pick. Luckily, Auntie Cheng knows plenty of buyers for your new toy. I'll send a finder's fee over to you right away. -Kindly Cheng
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_177: From: Dr. Shenyang Subject: Attending a party hey, ima keep this short cuz time is money. kindly said to drop you a line in case you forget what needs doing. get 2 repulse bay, dig up some some dirt on neville, and maybe get penny wong outa her contract.
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_199: [Ming Pao said there were four of them that got away - one they couldn't make out, two orks and a dwarf. A troll, an elf and a human were all killed on the scene. Word is that they're members of the White Star out of Henan, coming here to start trouble against the Executive Council.] - Wharf Rat 08:24:12/08-12-56
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_556: [We are t-minus 24 hours for Typhoon Usagi to cross ashore. I am signing off until tomorrow sometime; see attached list of met-sites if you wish to follow storm progress.] - White Prism
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_562: [Where has everybody gone on the boards.] - K0ngMing
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_563: [Does the term "crunch" mean anything to you?] - Blood Meridian
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_564: [People are running? Won't all the security forces be on high alert during the storm?] - Blood Meridian
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_565: [It's a sheer question of resource coverage, K0ngMing. Like arson in old UCAS cities on Halloween. There are innumerable targets across the Kong. High alert can't be maintained at even a fraction of them, through a typhoon. This is the fight the A-teams on both sides always know is coming.] - Blood Meridian
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_566: [But can't the corps just plan ahead, and hire more people?] - K0ngMing
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_567: [Blood Meridian? Are you there? Anyone?] - K0ngMing
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_579: [Brutal. There's a lot hiding between the lines.] - saywhut12358
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_580: [I'd expect White Prism to be posting on this.] - K0ngMing
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_581: [White Prism and Amonita are currently whereabouts-unknown.] - Blood Meridian
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_583: [I don't know. Get used to it. Over the next couple days, we're going to find out a lot of people are missing.] - Blood Meridian
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_585: [No, not holy hell: typhoon season. Welcome to the cull.] - Blood Meridian
54dcfec1303031bc0a006c6f_587: [Check this headline, just out: "METH FACTORY ACCIDENT DURING TYPHOON KILLS THOUSANDS IN WALLED CITY" For real? That stuff's terrifying. Check this newscast out.] - Contrail
5601e315626632941e0014eb_10: I hope that this message finds you and Duncan well. I wanted to let you know that the treatments and therapy seem to be working. The brain injury that I suffered in Prosperity Tower will take a long time to fully recover from, but I appear to be walking the correct path.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_15: From: Sergeant Lee Subject: Undersea Lab Job Hey. Good to see you're interested in my proposal. My friend - the one with the problem - is named Meng-kai Seow. He's been infected with a disease, and he thinks it was done deliberately. Here, I've attached the video message he sent me.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_26: From: Sergeant Lee Subject: Re: Undersea Lab Job If you're reading this, you've elected to take the job. This automated reply has let Meng know, and the minisub should be prepped and ready when you arrive. Go talk to Jomo, and he'll take you to the submersible.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_28: From: Jomo Subject: Prisoner liberation. Ho, my friend! Here I am, emailing you about the rescue mission that I was made aware of. It's mega-heist of epic proportions - a run on one of the most elite corporate residences and offices in all of the Free Enterprise Zone! Ain't nobody pulled a heist like this in a long time! I'm getting excited already.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_36: From: Jomo Subject: Re: Prisoner liberation. I'm not here right now, but you should be nearby. Come see me, and I will get you to Ikon Tower.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_38: From: Senior Inspector Lam Subject: Gearing up. If you find yourself in need of gear or supplies before your run on the Tigers' Den, speak with Sergeant Lee. He's the task force's quartermaster, and he has been instructed to equip and supply you as if you were one of us. You'll still need to pay for your gear, but he has an extensive stock of security-rated firearms that might interest you.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_42: From: Senior Inspector Lam Subject: Tigers' Den Infiltration - Recap Attached to this mail, you will find a brief recap of our conversation regarding the Tigers' Den. Please save this for your records and review as necessary. -Lam
5601e315626632941e0014eb_49: From: Lillian Lai I've attached your fee. Thanks again for what you did - I know things didn't go quite as planned. I'm impressed you stuck it out.
5601e315626632941e0014eb_54: From: Sergeant Lee Glad to hear the job's done. Payment is attached. Good work.
54d545e23030312c0c00300c_319: That's about all a person can do.
54d5743c3030314013003009_107: Yo, lemme know if you need anything. You're the biggest carnivore in the Kong.
54d5743c3030314013003009_112: Yo, you got it. Anybody ever tell you you're kinda a spooky one? You kinda are.
54d5743c3030314013003009_203: I mean, I believe you, 'cause you're legit... but no one else will. Here, I'll still hook you up. I guess reality is as strange as fiction.
54d5743c3030314013003009_305: Like I said, I'll take it off your hands for the price I named.
559ec0526236669809002374_34: I don't just have... s-something to do with it... This is my fault.
55a94da3623666741900929c_47: I'm afraid I am s-still in hell. Like Duncan, I need time to p-process all that... has happened. I have lived with a p-profound guilt for... twenty years. Coming face-to-face with m-my... victims has made it all the more... acute.
54d56f243030316013003007_66: Hey! I hardly saw you there. Come on in, don't be a stranger, beautiful!
565f3a6b62663208210043e7_57: [Did you authorize a second mind probe of the prisoner while they were unconscious? I'm looking at the transcript of their interview, and they insist that two mages were screwing around with their brain last night.] - Lam_Andy
56671922306364501800284d_16: I'm sure you've run into somebody with an axe to grind against your kind at some point in your life. Think of that, but make it the law. Now imagine that the thugs who're getting up in your face think you're a monster that's going to kill their kids. Long story short, they marched us out at gunpoint. It happened right before I was born, but I heard a lot of stories.
56097ecf643661801100391d_63: Maybe not. But as it happens, we do need one from you. We've got a problem - one that you're in a unique position to help us solve. We want to hire you.
565f3a8c62663208210043f1_61: Go to Jomo when you're ready. He'll sneak us into Tai Po, and we'll bring this thing to a close. Oh, and listen... I can't promise that we'll come back to the Benteng after this is over. Take in the sights now, because it might be the last chance you get.
55e8b58a643661a812007a17_105: I'd advise you to keep your threats to yourself. You aren't going anywhere unless we choose to let you go. By the way, the nosebleed that you suffered was nothing - a minor side effect of magical interrogation. Believe me, it could've been a lot worse.
56049c1c643661740e00133d_2: Very good. Thank you for recapping all of that for me. Your testimony was extremely helpful. And now that you've helped us, it's only fair that you learn something in return.
56049c1c643661740e00133d_46: Y'know, as a rule, I don't like smartasses, but you make a fair point. All right. Thank you for recapping all of that for me. Your testimony was extremely helpful.
54be866c3063641c1f001550_1: Are you prepared to become my servant, mortal? You must not resist, or I'll be forced to kill you. Should it come to that, I'll endeavor to make it swift and painless... but no promises.
